description: EdgeRouter 6P (ER-e300) — Cavium Octeon III, 5x GbE + SFP, no WiFi

hardware.notes: Boot: SPI NOR (U-Boot) -> VFAT /dev/mmcblk0p1 (vmlinux.64) -> rootfs /dev/mmcblk0p2. OpenWrt maps physical eth0=lan0(WAN), eth1-eth4=lan1-lan4(LAN), SFP=lan5. No WiFi hardware.

edgeos-kernel-swap.description: Two-stage SSH-based flash without serial cable. Stage 1: SSH to EdgeOS, replace /dev/mmcblk0p1:/vmlinux.64 with OpenWrt initramfs kernel, generate vmlinux.64.md5, reboot. Stage 2: After initramfs boots on LAN port (physical eth1-eth4), SCP sysupgrade.tar and use manual dd (NOT sysupgrade -- ubus broken in initramfs). Extract kernel to /boot/vmlinux.64, dd rootfs to /dev/mmcblk0p2. Requires bootloader v003+ (TFTP recovery fallback).
edgeos-kernel-swap.port_swap_note: After initramfs boots, move cable from physical eth0 to physical eth1+. OpenWrt maps eth0 as WAN.
edgeos-kernel-swap.reset_instructions: For recovery: connect to physical eth0, set laptop to 192.168.1.10/24, hold reset button while powering on for 30s until all LEDs light up, TFTP signed EdgeOS recovery image (.img.signed) to 192.168.1.20. Unsigned files rejected.

sysupgrade.description: SSH sysupgrade from existing OpenWrt on this device

tftp.description: U-Boot TFTP recovery (requires serial console or reset button + bootloader v003+)
tftp.notes: Reset button TFTP: hold reset while powering on ~30s, router becomes TFTP server at 192.168.1.20 on physical eth0. ONLY accepts .img.signed files (cryptographic signature required). Recovery image: dl.ubnt.com/firmwares/edgemax/v2.0.x/ER-e300.recovery.v2.0.6.*.img.signed (~112MB). Manual TFTP via serial uses .vmlinux.64 files instead.

edgeos.cmdline: root=/dev/mmcblk0p2 rootdelay=10 rw rootsqimg=squashfs.img rootsqwdir=w mtdparts=spi32766.0:2048k(boot0),2048k(boot1),64k(eeprom) console=ttyS0,115200

edgeos-kernel-swap.notes: OpenWrt 25.12.4 on EdgeRouter 6P (MAC 74:83:c2:XX:XX:XX). Stage 1 (kernel swap) and Stage 2 (manual dd) both successful. sysupgrade from initramfs does NOT work (ubus broken) -- use manual dd instead. TFTP recovery confirmed with signed .img.signed. Total time ~7 minutes when done correctly. First attempt failed due to sysupgrade from initramfs (bricked, required TFTP recovery). See recipes/ubiquiti/edgerouter-6p/notes.md for full lessons learned.

warnings: NEVER use sysupgrade from initramfs -- ubus/procd is non-functional, will partially write kernel and brick device
TFTP recovery ONLY accepts .img.signed files -- unsigned kernels and OpenWrt images are rejected
Physical eth0 is WAN in OpenWrt (firewall blocks SSH) -- use eth1-eth4 for LAN access after initramfs boots
SCP requires -O flag (Dropbear has no sftp-server)
Initramfs only has ash/sh, not bash -- use 'sh -c' not 'bash -c' for remote commands
